policy_name: National Young India Mediclaim Plus Policy

min_entry_age.source_quote: Entry age of Proposer should be between eighteen (18) years and forty five (45) years

max_entry_age.source_quote: Maximum entry age of any family member is forty five (45) years

grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases (Excl 01) a) Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of thirty six (36) months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 90 days/ one year/ two year/ four years (as specified against specific disease/ procedure)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity Cover (1 delivery/ termination, Waiting Period 2 years) – up to INR 30,000 (SI 5L), INR 40,000

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Medical Expenses incurred up to forty five (45) days immediately before the Insured Person is hospitalised

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: up to sixty (60) days immediately after the Insured Person is discharge

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (National Parivar Mediclaim covers 140+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.value: Single AC base room category, single occupancy. Proportionate deduction if higher category.
room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent - Single AC room charges (i.e., lowest single AC room category available in Hospital) ICU Charges - Actual ICU charges Proportionate Deduction shall apply if opted for Room of higher category

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.5 AYUSH Treatment The Company shall indemnify Medical Expenses incurred for Inpatient Care treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines during each Policy Period up to the limit of Sum Insured as specified in the Policy Schedule in any AYUSH Hospital.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 1.2.7 Maternity The Company shall indemnify Maternity Expenses as described below for any female Insured Person, and also Pre-Natal and Post- Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery, including expenses for necessary vaccination for the New Born Baby

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby shall be automatically covered from birth under the Sum Insured available to the mother during the corresponding Policy Period, for up to 3 months of age.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: 1.3.1 Reinstatement of Basic Sum Insured In the event of available Sum Insured being exhausted anytime during the Policy Year on account of Hospitalisation claim(s), the Company shall reinstate the exhausted Basic Sum Insured (i.e., excluding any CB)

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 5.23. Domiciliary Hospitalization & Out Patient Department (OPD) treatment Any expenses incurred on Domiciliary Hospitalization and OPD treatment

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility is available if TPA service is opted in the Policy

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the Hospital after verification

room_rent_capping.value: Single AC base room category, single occupancy. Proportionate deduction if higher category.
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent - Single AC room charges (i.e., lowest single AC room category available in Hospital) ICU Charges - Actual ICU charges Proportionate Deduction shall apply if opted for Room of higher category
